deep_dive.title: Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR
deep_dive.abstract: This paper investigates how language similarity can improve cross-lingual transfer for automatic speech recognition (ASR) in extremely low-resource settings. Warlpiri, an Australian Aboriginal language, has very limited transcribed speech data, making transfer learning essential. We propose a framework combining acoustic similarity from pre-trained speech models with linguistic similarity based on typology, phoneme inventories, grammatical, and syntactic features to rank high-resource source languages and evaluate their effectiveness for ASR transfer to Warlpiri. Experiments with Whisper show that acoustically and typologically similar languages outperform monolingual and multilingual baselines. Assamese and Hindi achieve substantial reductions in word and character error rates. Correlation analysis further indicates that acoustic similarity is the strongest predictor of fine-tuning performance, while phoneme inventory and typological similarity better explain zero-shot transfer.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes framework using acoustic and linguistic similarity for cross-lingual ASR transfer to low-resource language, improving accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出利用声学和语言学相似性进行跨语言ASR迁移的框架，提升低资源语言识别准确率。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出利用声学和语言学相似性进行跨语言ASR迁移的框架，提升低资源语言识别准确率。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出利用声学和语言学相似性进行跨语言ASR迁移的框架，提升低资源语言识别准确率。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Addresses low-resource ASR by ranking high-resource languages via acoustic and linguistic similarity for transfer learning; experiments with Whisper show improved WER over monolingual and multilingual baselines.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对极低资源语言Warlpiri的ASR问题，提出结合预训练语音模型声学相似度与语言类型学、音素、语法等语言学相似度的框架，筛选高资源源语言进行迁移学习；Whisper实验表明，声学和类型学相似的语言显著优于单语和多语基线，阿萨姆语和印地语效果最好。该方法为低资源语言ASR提供了有效的语言选择策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对极低资源语言Warlpiri的ASR问题，提出结合预训练语音模型声学相似度与语言类型学、音素、语法等语言学相似度的框架，筛选高资源源语言进行迁移学习；Whisper实验表明，声学和类型学相似的语言显著优于单语和多语基线，阿萨姆语和印地语效果最好。该方法为低资源语言ASR提供了有效的语言选择策略。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

deep_dive.title: FdAudio: MeanFlow-Anchored Fréchet-Distance Post-Training for One-Step Text-to-Audio Generation
deep_dive.abstract: While recent few-step sampling text-to-audio generation models like MeanAudio substantially accelerate generation by modeling average velocities, their strict one-step generation quality still lags significantly behind multi-step counterparts. We propose FdAudio to bridge this gap. Unlike MeanAudio, which relies solely on regression against target velocity fields, our post-training approach optimizes the final one-step distribution directly across pre-trained embedding spaces via a multi-representation Fréchet-distance (FD) loss. Crucially, to prevent the multi-step degradation that naive post-training with FD-loss causes, we introduce a MeanFlow consistency objective as a structural anchor. Results demonstrate that FdAudio establishes state-of-the-art one-step T2A generation quality among few-step systems, yielding an 11.4% reduction in FD score and a 28.8% improvement in FAD score relative to the baseline MeanAudio framework. Notably, we solve FD post-training's naive multi-step degradation issue by proposing the MeanFlow anchor, enabling a 25-step sampling path to maintain high-fidelity audio synthesis that matches or surpasses strong multi-step models at a fraction of their computational latency.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: post-training method to improve one-step text-to-audio generation quality
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 后训练方法提升一步式文本到音频生成质量
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 后训练方法提升一步式文本到音频生成质量
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 后训练方法提升一步式文本到音频生成质量
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes FdAudio, a post-training method that improves one-step text-to-audio generation quality via multi-representation Fréchet distance loss with a mean flow consistency anchor.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对一步式文本到音频生成质量落后于多步模型的问题，提出FdAudio后训练方案。通过多表示空间Fréchet距离损失直接优化最终分布，并引入均值流一致性目标作为结构锚点，防止多步退化。实验表明该方法显著提升一步生成音质，在保持高效推理的同时缩小了与多步模型的差距，为快速语音合成和音频生成提供了高质量方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对一步式文本到音频生成质量落后于多步模型的问题，提出FdAudio后训练方案。通过多表示空间Fréchet距离损失直接优化最终分布，并引入均值流一致性目标作为结构锚点，防止多步退化。实验表明该方法显著提升一步生成音质，在保持高效推理的同时缩小了与多步模型的差距，为快速语音合成和音频生成提供了高质量方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

quick_skim.title: RDQ: Residual Distribution Quantization for Large Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) of large language models degrades sharply below 4-bit precision. We identify the root cause as residual stream distributional drift: quantization noise injected at each transformer layer accumulates in the shared residual representation, causing KL divergence from the FP16 baseline to grow super-linearly with depth (Pearson r=0.999 with log-perplexity, p<0.001, confirmed across all tested methods and bit-widths). We discover that 84% of LLaMA-3-8B layers exhibit non-Gaussian residual distributions (KS test, p<=0.05), and that per-layer residual stream variance grows 6,548x across depth. We propose RDQ (Residual Distribution Quantization), a PTQ framework whose central contribution is Cascaded Error Compensation (CEC): a sequential calibration procedure that captures the actual drifted activations each layer receives (computed by running calibration data through already-quantized upstream layers) and fits per-channel AWQ-style scales against those drifted inputs, with scales folded into preceding RMSNorm weights for exact mathematical equivalence at zero inference overhead. RDQ achieves state-of-the-art results on all three tested architectures: LLaMA-3-8B: 7.55 / 5.62 PPL (W3/W4); Qwen-2.5-7B: 7.46 / 6.38 PPL; Mistral-7B: 6.88 / 5.73 PPL. RDQ beats the best published baseline (LeanQuant/SpinQuant) at every model and bit-width combination, with gains up to -46.4% vs. RTN at W3A16 on LLaMA-3-8B. All output is standard group-128 asymmetric quantization, deployable on Qualcomm AIMET, GGUF, and any standard inference stack at zero runtime overhead.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Proposes residual distribution quantization with cascaded error compensation for LLMs, applicable to large speech models to improve inference efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出残差分布量化及级联误差补偿，用于LLM，可应用于大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出残差分布量化及级联误差补偿，用于LLM，可应用于大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出残差分布量化及级联误差补偿，用于LLM，可应用于大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Identifies residual stream distributional drift as cause of PTQ degradation in LLMs, and proposes RDQ with cascaded error compensation to mitigate it; method could be extended to speech foundation models for efficient inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 揭示LLM量化性能下降源于残差流分布漂移，提出RDQ框架，核心是级联误差补偿；该方法可扩展到语音大模型，实现高效推理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 揭示LLM量化性能下降源于残差流分布漂移，提出RDQ框架，核心是级联误差补偿；该方法可扩展到语音大模型，实现高效推理。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed

quick_skim.title: Investigating the Integration of Spatial Information in Foundation-Model-Based Speaker Diarization
quick_skim.abstract: Spatial information gleaned from multi-channel input has been shown to lead to improvements in meeting processing tasks like diarization and source separation. At the same time, diarization based on features extracted by large pretrained single-channel foundation models, such as WavLM, achieved state-of-the-art performance. This work compares three approaches to integrate spatial features into foundation model-based diarization systems: the cascade of a beamformer and a single-channel foundation model, a multi-channel foundation model, and the conditioning of the downstream network on explicitly extracted spatial features. Results show that the beamformer front-end is even detrimental to diarization performance in regions of overlapped speech, while best performance is achieved with the conditioning, demonstrating that the incorporation of explicit spatial features is a competitive approach to foundation-model-supported diarization. This approach is further subjected to a detailed error analysis showing that the conditioning system removes errors to a good extent that would occur when either only spectral or only spatial features were used.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: integrating spatial features into diarization as a preprocessing step for speech systems
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将空间信息集成到说话人日志化中作为语音系统预处理步骤
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将空间信息集成到说话人日志化中作为语音系统预处理步骤
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将空间信息集成到说话人日志化中作为语音系统预处理步骤
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Compares three approaches to integrate spatial features into WavLM-based diarization: beamformer cascade, multi-channel model, and explicit spatial conditioning, finding beamformer can be detrimental.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在多通道会议处理中，空间信息能提升说话人日志化等任务性能，而大预训练模型如WavLM则提供了强大特征。本文比较了三种将空间信息融入基于基础模型的日志化系统的方法：波束形成器级联、多通道基础模型和显式空间特征条件化。实验表明波束形成器前端在某些条件下反而损害日志化性能，为语音前端设计和集成提供了经验指导。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在多通道会议处理中，空间信息能提升说话人日志化等任务性能，而大预训练模型如WavLM则提供了强大特征。本文比较了三种将空间信息融入基于基础模型的日志化系统的方法：波束形成器级联、多通道基础模型和显式空间特征条件化。实验表明波束形成器前端在某些条件下反而损害日志化性能，为语音前端设计和集成提供了经验指导。

quick_skim.title: Cross-Layer Error Compensation and Finite-Sample Feature-Statistics Matching for Extreme Low-Bit Quantization of Large Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: Layer-wise post-training quantization of large language models minimizes each layer's reconstruction error in isolation, allowing quantization errors to accumulate across depth and causing severe degradation in extreme low-bit regimes. We formulate quantization as a joint optimization over the discrete codes and scales of all layers, driven by two mechanisms: (i) cross-layer error compensation, which maintains the network-level accumulated error through the recursion e_{l+1} = A_l e_l + q_l, with a propagation operator A_l derived from the layer's input differential and a local quantization residual q_l evaluated at teacher features; and (ii) finite-sample feature-statistics matching, which aligns means, projected covariances, and centered empirical kernels between the full-precision and quantized networks under relative normalization. We prove that instantiating the propagation operator as a finite difference of the quantized network makes the recursion exact for arbitrary nonlinear layers, enabling an efficient forward-difference implementation. Binary weights are optimized via a mirror-descent parameterization u = tanh(beta*z) with annealed inverse temperature and group-wise log-scales. On Qwen2.5-1.5B with 1.125-bit group-binary weights, error compensation alone reaches a perplexity ratio of 9.56 +/- 0.15 over the FP16 teacher, outperforming logit distillation (14.09 +/- 0.53; 32 percent relative, more than 8 sigma over 3 seeds) and layer-local reconstruction by two orders of magnitude. The same objective transfers unchanged to 4-bit quantization (1.060 vs. 1.088 for layer-local). Out-of-domain evaluations (C4, CNN/DailyMail) show the advantage of error compensation grows off-domain, while statistics matching keeps feature-statistics discrepancy low off-domain (0.42-0.88 vs. 1.41-2.99 without it), revealing a complementary division of labor between the two mechanisms.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Introduces cross-layer error compensation for extreme low-bit quantization of LLMs, which can be applied to large speech models to improve inference efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出跨层误差补偿的极低比特量化方法，用于LLM，可迁移至大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出跨层误差补偿的极低比特量化方法，用于LLM，可迁移至大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出跨层误差补偿的极低比特量化方法，用于LLM，可迁移至大型语音模型提升推理效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a post-training quantization method with cross-layer error compensation to mitigate error accumulation in low-bit LLMs; technique potentially applicable to speech foundation models for memory and speed gains.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大型语言模型极低比特量化误差累积问题，提出跨层误差补偿和有限样本特征统计匹配的联合优化框架；该方法可潜在地迁移至语音大模型，提升量化后推理效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对大型语言模型极低比特量化误差累积问题，提出跨层误差补偿和有限样本特征统计匹配的联合优化框架；该方法可潜在地迁移至语音大模型，提升量化后推理效率。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed
